name: impact-destruction-feedback
description: Verify damage-scaled directional destruction, bounded hybrid debris, a single reusable impact-audio channel, and no center-screen action spam.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local debris=root['Depth Physics Debris'] local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local function prep(power) c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=power,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local r=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) r.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero end prep(15) local low=c:Invoke('PunchRadius') task.wait(.08) local lowCount=#debris:GetChildren() prep(1e12) local high=c:Invoke('PunchRadius') task.wait(.08) local highCount=#debris:GetChildren() local forwardPositive=true local frontPositive=true local serverOwned=true local minForce=math.huge local maxForce=0 for _,fragment in ipairs(debris:GetChildren()) do local force=fragment:GetAttribute('ImpactForceScale') or 0 minForce=math.min(minForce,force) maxForce=math.max(maxForce,force) if (fragment:GetAttribute('InitialForwardSpeed') or 0)<=0 then forwardPositive=false end if (fragment:GetAttribute('SpawnFrontOffset') or 0)<=0 then frontPositive=false end local ok,owner=pcall(function() return fragment:GetNetworkOwner() end) if ok and owner~=nil then serverOwned=false end end local valid=low.ok and high.ok and lowCount>0 and highCount>lowCount and highCount<=120 and high.brokenCount>low.brokenCount and forwardPositive and frontPositive and serverOwned and minForce>=.7 and maxForce>1 return H:JSONEncode({lowFragments=lowCount,highFragments=highCount,cap=root:GetAttribute('MaxDepthPhysicsFragments'),lowBroken=low.brokenCount,highBroken=high.brokenCount,forwardPositive=forwardPositive,frontPositive=frontPositive,serverOwned=serverOwned,minForce=minForce,maxForce=maxForce,valid=valid})

steps.label: hybrid debris scales and remains bounded

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') task.wait(.35) local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local soundService=game:GetService('SoundService') local channelCount=0 local musicCount=0 for _,item in ipairs(soundService:GetChildren()) do if item:IsA('Sound') and item.Name=='Punch Impact Channel' then channelCount+=1 end if item:IsA('Sound') and item.Name=='Hero Forest Music' and item.Looped then musicCount+=1 end end local debris=workspace:FindFirstChild('Local Punch Debris') local localCount=debris and #debris:GetChildren() or 0 local centerDamage=#g:GetDescendants() local centerSpam=0 for _,item in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if item.Name=='LocalDamageNumber' or item.Name=='CombatDamageBurst' or item.Name=='CombatImpactCore' or item.Name=='CombatSparkRays' then centerSpam+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({channelCount=channelCount,musicCount=musicCount,localDebris=localCount,centerSpam=centerSpam,centerEnabled=g:GetAttribute('CenterActionFeedbackEnabled'),feedbackCount=g:GetAttribute('FeedbackCount') or 0,lastType=g:GetAttribute('LastFeedbackType'),valid=channelCount==1 and musicCount==1 and localCount>0 and localCount<=64 and centerSpam==0 and g:GetAttribute('CenterActionFeedbackEnabled')~=true and (g:GetAttribute('FeedbackCount') or 0)>0})

steps.label: client feedback uses one audio channel without center spam
